description_for_human: Retrieves workforce KPIs, retention risk, attendance health, and HR report requests from the HR Workforce Intelligence Platform.

functions.name: getWorkforceOverview
functions.description: Returns workforce health KPIs such as retention, attendance, productivity, and department risk bands.

functions.name: getAgentWorkforceContext
functions.description: Returns a concise, safety-filtered workforce intelligence answer for Microsoft 365 Copilot responses.

functions.name: attritionPredictions
functions.description: Returns explainable attrition risk and productivity prediction scores for scoped workforce populations.

functions.name: generateReport
functions.description: Queues an auditable HR workforce report generation request.
